title: Origins: Traveling
description: A datapack for the minecraft origins mod. Adds the custom traveling origin, which uses its spaceship to travel around the world
body:
Traveling (Impact 3 Origin)

By Shiny (or 8hiny on discord)

Powerlist:

🚀 Traveling
Impact: 🔴🔴🔴

*Fragile extraterrestrials with a fondness for spacecraft.*

🛰️ **Mobile Home**

You can call your trusty spaceship to yourself, wherever you are, as long as you are standing on a block. If your ship is summoned anywhere, you respawn inside it.
> Summon with your primary key when on the ground.
> Recall with your primary key when within range of your ship.
> Other players (only one at a time) will be able to ride the roof of your ship.

> When inside your ship:
> -Infinite air supply
> -**Total** invulnerability
> -Able to open a crafting table, ship storage and charge the ship's hyperdrive engine

☄️ **Hyperdrive**

Charge up your ship’s hyperdrive, releasing an extreme burst of speed on activation. While in hyperspace your ship will move through any physical obstacles besides unbreakable blocks, also unable to change direction.
> Hold your secondary key to build up hyperdrive charge.
> Hyperdrive is initiated once you stop building up charge or charge reaches its maximum.
> The cooldown for hyperdrive is always double the amount of charge used.
> If you exit hyperspace while inside a block your ship will relocate to the topmost block in the world at that position.

🌟 **Tractor Beam**

You can activate your ship’s tractor beam to draw yourself or other creatures towards it. While outside of your ship, the beam will only affect you.

💥 **Ejecting Jolt**

When shot upon with a projectile, the sudden trauma forces your ship to eject you, temporarily preventing you from activating its functions.
> If you get ejected while your hyperdrive is being charged, the hyperdrive engine will lose all charge and its cooldown will trigger.

🍃 **Alien Physique**

Less affected by gravity, your body falls slower and leaps higher, even allowing you to walk on water.

🛡️ **Frail**

Your body possesses only half as much health and can't exert as much force.
